text:
There once sat a wise old owl on a wise old tree. He would hear many stories. Once, he listened to a young chipmunk who said she wanted a pet.

"I'll find you the perfect creature!" the chipmunk chirped.

"What kind?" the owl asked curiously.

"A big friend who loves burrowying!"

"The mole?"

No! A giraffe!

An owl isn't fast.

A camel, maybe?

No. She wanted a falcon.

Why? You talk too fast.

A falcon would never sleep with her.

The owl thought for a moment. Perhaps a duck.

The owl went to sleep dreaming about ducks.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
